titleStmt.title: SII 38.116: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 116. (A.R. No. 116 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravatti Rājarāja III Year 3: 1219 A.D.

summary.p: Records a gift of 32 cows by Ulagāḷuḍaiyāṉ Sūryadēvaṉ alias Viyakarṇadāṉa Bhaṭṭaṉ of Kāśyapa-gōttira of Umippuṟam in order to burn a perpetual lamp at the temple in Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻar-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. A cowherd of Tribhuvanasundara-tteru, Pallavan Iḷanambi received the gift and agreed to burn the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhupuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 3āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟko
ṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār koyilil teva
kanmi kāśyapakottirattu Umippuṟattu Ulakāḷuṭaiyāṉ cū
riya tevaṉāṉa vyākaraṇatāṉaThis may also be read as vyākiraṇapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ikkoyilil ṉān
Iṭṭa coti mālaiyil vaitta tirununtā viḷakku � Onṟukkum tiripu
vanacuntaratteruvil maṉṟāṭikaḷil pallavaṉ Iḷanampiyeṉ Ivar vai
tta tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukkum ṉāṉ kaikkoṇṭa pacu 3 10 2 muppa
ttiraṇṭum kaikkoṇṭu Ivviḷakku candrādittavarai celuttak kaṭave
ṉāṉeṉ pallavaṉ Iḷanampiyeṉ .§ panmāheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 38.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
